zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Orreby於1220年出生在英國爾阿爾萬利時，她的父親Philip de Orreby II30歲，母親Leuca de Mohaut18歲。她於大約1247年與Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester在英國爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年9月在她的家鄉享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Orreby于1220年出生在英国爾阿爾萬利时，她的父亲Philip de Orreby II30岁，母亲Leuca de Mohaut18岁。她于大约1247年与Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester在英国爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年9月在她的家乡享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Orreby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Orry
meanings: English: variant of   Orrey  ;  see  Urry  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Orreby was born in 1220, in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, her father, Philip de Orreby II, was 30 and her mother, Leuca de Mohaut, was 18. She married Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester about 1247, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in September 1300, in her hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Orreby est née en 1220, à Alvanley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip de Orreby II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Leuca de Mohaut, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester environ 1247, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1300, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, Uni: North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Orreby 1220 in Alvanley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip de Orreby II 30 und ihre Mutter Leuca de Mohaut 18. Sie hat um 1247 in Cheshire, England Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im September 1300 im Alter von 80 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Orreby è nata il nel 1220 nel Alvanley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Philip de Orreby II, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Leuca de Mohaut, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester circa 1247, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1300, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Orrebyが1220年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルヴァンリーで生まれた時，父Philip de Orreby IIは30歳，母Leuca de Mohautは18歳であった。約1247年にイギリスチェシュアイアでSir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年9月に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Orreby(이)가 1220년 영국 체실르 앨반리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip de Orreby II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Leuca de Mohaut(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1247년 영국 체실르에서 Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 9월 그녀의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Orreby nasceu em 1220, em Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip de Orreby II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Leuca de Mohaut, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester aproximadamente 1247, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1300, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Orreby родилась в 1220 г. в местности алванли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip de Orreby II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Leuca de Mohaut, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester около 1247 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла сентябрь 1300 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 80 лет.
